body: "Details of the application  The Environment Agency has received an application to vary (change) an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016 from BW Skip Hire Limited.  The proposed variation does not involve substantial change.  Application number EPR/WE8100AC/A001  Regulated facility type A new Bespoke Permit application for the treatment of 200,000te per annum of soils and aggregates using a closed water system wash plant. All storage, treatment, and waste handling is external.  Regulated facility address   Anchor WorksSwinnow ViewLeedsLS13 4TY   How to view and comment on the application  If you have any comments on the application send these by 29 December 2025.  You can comment:  Online: view and comment on the application using Citizen Space  Via email: pscpublicresponse@environment-agency.gov.uk  For advice about how to make a representation or if you are unable to make a representation via e-mail, please call 03708 506 506.  The Environment Agency will normally put any comments it receives on the public register. This includes your name but not your personal contact details. Please tell us if you do not want your response to be public.  The privacy notice for permit applicants/operators can be viewed at Privacy Notice "
